response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience with strong multi-language proficiency (C++, Java, JavaScript, D, etc.), but his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile applications and high-level systems rather than embedded networking or firmware development. He lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modifications, switch chip knowledge, or embedded security features like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X. His language skills (fluent English, basic German) do not meet the required native-level Japanese proficiency. The interview could explore his adaptability and potential to transition into embedded security roles.
strengths: Strong multi-language programming skills (C++, Java, JavaScript, D)
Experience with real-time systems, low-latency applications, and micro-services
Proven ability to learn and master new technologies quickly (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, embedded tools)
concerns: No direct experience with embedded firmware, Linux kernel modifications, or networking hardware (switch chips)
Limited exposure to security technologies like MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or device tamper detection
